response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in C/C++ (including embedded and desktop systems) but lacks the required 5–10 years of professional C++ development on Windows platforms in a capital markets or fixed-income context. Their domain expertise is primarily in geospatial platforms, direct mail automation, and investment practices (Node.js, TypeScript, Python) rather than fixed-income systems or investment banking. While they meet some technical criteria (SQL, JavaScript), their profile does not align closely with the mandatory financial-services domain requirements.
strengths: Proven track record in full-stack development and system architecture
Experience with TDD, CI/CD, and performance optimization
concerns: Limited Windows C++ development experience in financial domains (5–10 years required)
No demonstrated fixed-income, investment banking, or capital markets experience
Primary expertise in Node.js/TypeScript/Python rather than C++ for financial systems
